creator: peterho@ned.dem.csiro.au
text:
A port of the code at ftp://ftp.hungry.com/pub/hungry/viewkit (see also www.hungry.com)
        of Hungry's SGI ViewKit work-alike. Hungry are the same people responsible for lesstif.
        Original Hungry code not at all complete or stable, but compiles & links fine.

	make   # for open-motif

        make MOTIFPACKAGE=motif20   # for Full Motif 2.0 implementation.

        make MOTIFPACKAGE=motif10   # for old motif/lesstif implemetation.
